  1. uno.anahata.asi.agi.context
  2. ContextProvider

Uses of Interface
uno.anahata.asi.agi.context.ContextProvider

Packages that use ContextProvider
Package
Description
uno.anahata.asi.agi.context
Manages the conversation history and the injection of just-in-time context.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.context.core
Defines the contract for providers that inject just-in-time context into an AI request.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource
Provides the V2 Universal Resource Pipeline (URP) infrastructure.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool
Provides the core framework for defining, managing, and executing local Java tools.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi
Defines the model-agnostic domain model for the tool (function) calling subsystem.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.java
Provides the concrete domain model for tools implemented as Java methods via reflection.
uno.anahata.asi.nb.annotation
Provides the non-intrusive annotation system for visual feedback within the NetBeans IDE.
uno.anahata.asi.nb.mine
Provides specialized "mining" utilities for extracting deep configuration and assets from the NetBeans IDE environment.
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.ide
Provides toolkits for interacting with the NetBeans IDE environment.
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.ide.context
Provides specialized context providers for the NetBeans IDE windowing system.
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.java
Provides Java-specific toolkits that leverage the NetBeans Java Source and Parsing APIs.
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.maven
Contains the models and tools for interacting with the Apache Maven ecosystem within the NetBeans IDE.
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.project
Provides a robust integration layer for NetBeans Project APIs, enabling programmatic management of the project lifecycle and environment within the ASI framework.
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.project.alerts
Provides real-time diagnostic and alerting capabilities for NetBeans projects within the ASI framework.
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.project.context
Provides a hierarchical context-injection layer for NetBeans projects.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.context
Provides components and hierarchical models for the ASI Context Explorer.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.icons
The central hub for all programmatically drawn icons within the Anahata ASI Swing UI.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.toolkit
Swing-specific toolkit implementations and context abstractions for Anahata ASI.
uno.anahata.asi.toolkit
High-level tool implementations for autonomous agentic workflows.
uno.anahata.asi.toolkit.java
Provides the core machinery for dynamic Java compilation and execution.
uno.anahata.asi.toolkit.resources
Provides the URI-centric engine for the management and surgical mutation of multimodal resources.
uno.anahata.asi.toolkit.shell
Host-level shell execution and stream management.
uno.anahata.asi.yam.tools
Provides experimental and multimodal toolkits that extend the core ASI capabilities into browser automation, advanced audio management, and speech synthesis.
uno.anahata.asi.yam.tools.browser
Provides an abstract foundation and state management for browser automation toolkits.
uno.anahata.asi.yam.tools.chrome
Provides a specialized toolkit for controlling Google Chrome and Chromium-based browsers.
uno.anahata.asi.yam.tools.firefox
Provides the specialized toolkit for web automation using the Firefox browser.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BasicContextProvider
    A basic, reusable implementation of the ContextProvider interface that provides the foundational logic for hierarchical context management.

    Description

    Description

    OpenTopComponentsContextProvider
    Provides a real-time Markdown table of all open TopComponents (windows) in the IDE.

    OutputTabsContextProvider
    Provides a list of all open tabs in the NetBeans Output Window, including a tail of the content for each tab.
